description: narrow concern for one model behaviour — Closable handles only termination logic
input:
module Account::Closable
  extend ActiveSupport::Concern

  def terminate
    purge_or_incinerate if terminable?
  end

  private

  def terminable?
    active? && !legal_hold?
  end

  def purge_or_incinerate
    can_incinerate? ? incinerate! : purge!
  end
end
